prompt: Turn this photo into a chaotic funny doodle illustration, intentionally messy and low-skill, as if drawn quickly with a cheap marker, crayon, or worn-out felt pen on paper. Create exaggerated facial features with awkward proportions, uneven eyes, oversized head, tiny body, crooked smile, and clumsy anatomy while still keeping the person recognizable. Use rough childish sketch lines, shaky hand-drawn strokes, visible scribbles, overlapping outlines, accidental marks, and random doodles around the scene. Add a simple cartoon-style background with badly drawn buildings, trees, clouds, street elements, and uneven perspective. Coloring should look careless and imperfect, with visible stroke texture, inconsistent fill areas, marker bleed, and irregular shading.
